name: Schafer Electric
tagline: North Bay electrical done right the first time — since 2006
seoDescription: Schafer Electric Services is a family-owned, licensed C-10 electrical contractor serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma, Napa & Marin since 2006. 24/7 emergency service.

sections.heading: Santa Rosa's trusted electrical contractor
sections.subheading: Family-owned and operated since 2006, with state-certified electricians serving homes and businesses across Sonoma, Napa, and Marin County.

sections.heading: About Schafer Electric
body: Founded in 2006 by Ben Schafer, Schafer Electric Services, Inc. is a family-owned and operated electrical contractor built on good, old-fashioned values: do the job right the first time and treat every customer the way you'd want to be treated. From a minor repair to a full system upgrade, the team brings the same care to every project.

A licensed C-10 contractor (CSLB Lic. #874111) staffed by state-certified electricians, Schafer Electric serves residential and commercial clients throughout Santa Rosa and the greater North Bay — Sonoma, Napa, and Marin County. With four service crews and a dedicated emergency crew, they're equipped to respond 24/7, and their fully stocked trucks let them complete roughly 95% of jobs without leaving for materials.
highlights: Licensed C-10 electrical contractor, CSLB Lic. #874111
Four crews plus a dedicated 24/7 emergency service crew

items.title: Residential Electrical
items.description: Complete home electrical service, from minor repairs and troubleshooting to full rewiring and system upgrades.

items.title: Commercial Electrical
items.description: Electrical work for offices, retail, and commercial buildings — installation, service, and tenant improvements across the North Bay.

items.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
items.description: Inspection, upgrade, and relocation of electrical panels to keep your home or business safe and up to code.

items.title: Lighting Design & Installation
items.description: Interior lighting and design, recessed can lights, plus outdoor, landscape, and security lighting.

items.title: EV Home Charging Stations
items.description: Installation of electric vehicle home charging stations sized to your vehicle and panel.

items.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
items.description: A dedicated emergency crew on call around the clock for urgent electrical problems.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Schafer Electric and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: Fantastic service! Very efficient, professional, and was always willing to explain work and address anything that was needed. Highly recommend Schafer Electric!

This is the second time that I have worked with Schafer Electric Services, Inc and I can say that they are wonderful. They showed up on time and did a fabulous job. Tim and Adam were very knowledgeable and thorough.
items.author: Repeat customer

items.quote: I couldn't have had a better experience – no hard sell, no unnecessary work, just professional and cordial customer service from the office staff to the top. I've used this company several times and have passed them on to friends.
items.author: Longtime customer

sections.heading: Work with Schafer Electric
sections.body: Find us at 631 Rinaldo St. Call (707) 545-3300 — we’re glad to help.
